subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Object of all praise, Who hath dispelled the doubts of the learned, nullified the gestures of the turbaned ones, and subdued the might of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را سزاست که شبهات اهل علم و اشارات اصحاب عمائم و سطوت عالم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
